info.name: NearProp Property Advisor Collection
info.description: A comprehensive collection of APIs for Property Advisor role in NearProp application

request.description: Login to the NearProp platform as a Property Advisor
Request Property Advisor role in the NearProp platform
Verify email with OTP
Get all role requests made by the current user

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Luxury Apartment in City Center",
    "description": "Beautiful spacious apartment with modern amenities",
    "propertyType": "APARTMENT",
    "price": 15000000,
    "area": 1500,
    "bedrooms": 3,
    "bathrooms": 2,
    "address": {
        "addressLine1": "123 Main Street",
        "addressLine2": "Apartment 4B",
        "city": "Mumbai",
        "state": "Maharashtra",
        "district": "Mumbai Suburban",
        "postalCode": "400001",
        "latitude": 19.0760,
        "longitude": 72.8777
    },
    "amenities": ["SWIMMING_POOL", "GYM", "SECURITY", "PARKING"],
    "images": ["https://example.com/image1.jpg", "https://example.com/image2.jpg"],
    "status": "AVAILABLE",
    "isNew": false
}

request.description: Create a new property as a Property Advisor

formdata.value: Beautiful spacious apartment with modern amenities

request.description: Create a new property with form data including file uploads
Get details of a specific property

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Updated Luxury Apartment in City Center",
    "description": "Beautiful spacious apartment with modern amenities and great view",
    "propertyType": "APARTMENT",
    "price": 16000000,
    "area": 1500,
    "bedrooms": 3,
    "bathrooms": 2,
    "address": {
        "addressLine1": "123 Main Street",
        "addressLine2": "Apartment 4B",
        "city": "Mumbai",
        "state": "Maharashtra",
        "district": "Mumbai Suburban",
        "postalCode": "400001",
        "latitude": 19.0760,
        "longitude": 72.8777
    },
    "amenities": ["SWIMMING_POOL", "GYM", "SECURITY", "PARKING", "GARDEN"],
    "images": ["https://example.com/image1.jpg", "https://example.com/image2.jpg", "https://example.com/image3.jpg"],
    "status": "AVAILABLE",
    "isNew": false
}
